message:
feat(embed): implement ApiEmbedder with HTTP transport, retry, rate limiting, and L2 normalization

Add api_embedder.rs — the concrete Embedder implementation that wraps
any ApiProvider (OpenAI, Gemini, etc.) with:

- Token-bucket rate limiter (configurable requests_per_minute)
- Exponential backoff retry on 429 and 5xx responses
- L2 normalization of returned embedding vectors
- Asupersync HTTP/1.1 client for non-blocking transport
- CachedEmbedder integration for disk-level dedup
- MRL (Matryoshka Representation Learning) dimension truncation support

Also fix unused ApiEmbedderConfig import in auto_detect.rs now that
the config struct lives in the new module and ApiEmbedder::new()
accepts the provider directly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
